new_value: Complete: HTTP bootstrap calls removed from startup paths (run_directory_mode/run_exec_mode). Startup uses MQTT/cyan-only flow via sync_schema_via_cyan() and build_uuid_map_and_write_schemas(). Follow-ups CP-ua3g and CP-yrsb both closed.

old_value:
{"id":"CP-q4un","title":"MQTT-only subdir watcher create propagation is flaky","description":"Summary: The new MQTT-only regression `test_mqtt_only_watcher_create_in_subdir_propagates_to_server_and_peer` is non-deterministic. In one run it timed out waiting for schema entry `created-via-watcher.txt` (schema remained empty), but immediate reruns passed. This indicates a race in subdir watcher/create propagation rather than a deterministic logic failure.

Files to investigate:
- tests/sync_integration_tests.rs (test_mqtt_only_watcher_create_in_subdir_propagates_to_server_and_peer and polling helper timing)
- src/sync/dir_sync.rs (handle_subdir_new_files scheduling/order)
- src/sync/transport/subscriptions/subdir_task.rs (subdir schema apply/refresh ordering)
- src/bin/sync.rs (watcher create event path to CRDT schema update)

Implementation steps:
1. Reproduce with repeated runs of the single create test and paired mqtt_only_watcher_ suite.
2. Capture logs/ordering around watcher create, schema publish, and subdir schema receive/apply when timeout occurs.
3. Fix ordering/race so subdir schema entry appears deterministically under MQTT-only mode.
4. Keep regression test and add stability guard (or explicit retry semantics) to prevent sporadic timeouts.

Example:
Before: occasional timeout waiting for `created-via-watcher.txt` in subdir schema despite no code changes between runs.
After: repeated runs consistently converge and schema entry appears every time.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"jes5199@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-19T04:21:54Z","created_by":"Jes Wolfe!","updated_at":"2026-02-19T04:21:54Z","work_type":"mutex"}

After: repeated runs consistently converge and schema entry appears every time.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"jes5199@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-19T04:21:54Z","created_by":"Jes Wolfe!","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:25:41Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Fixed race between directory creation and schema file write in two ways: (1) added retry logic in find_owning_document when schema file is missing but subdir exists, (2) added wait_for_schema_file_exists test helper to ensure subdir watcher has fully initialized before tests create files
